place: Thong Krut, Taling Ngam, Koh Samui, Thailand
title: Private Hillside Sea & Mountain View Estate
blurb: Set within an exclusive gated estate in the tranquil south of Koh Samui, a five-bedroom hillside villa wrapped in lush hills and uninterrupted views of the southern islands — refined, private, and surrounded by nothing but green and sea.
detail:
Set within an exclusive gated estate in the tranquil south of Koh Samui, this exceptional five-bedroom villa offers a rare blend of privacy, scale and breathtaking natural beauty. Surrounded by lush hills and overlooking the southern islands, the property captures uninterrupted sea and mountain views from every angle. Positioned on a generous 1,693 m² plot with 830 m² of built space, it is designed for those seeking refined living in a peaceful, nature-immersed environment — far from the crowds, yet within a well-managed and secure community.

Designed to embrace its natural surroundings, every room opens directly onto outdoor terraces, creating a seamless flow between interior living and the landscape beyond. The 48 m² saltwater infinity pool and large sun deck become the focal point of the home, with uninterrupted views across the ocean and nearby islands, while a traditional Thai sala nestled in the garden offers a quiet retreat for relaxation, meditation or sunset moments. An independent ground-floor apartment adds flexibility — ideal as a guest suite, staff quarters, or private living space.

Located in the serene Thong Krut / Taling Ngam area, known for its untouched beauty and relaxed atmosphere, the estate sits close to Thong Krut Beach and local seaside restaurants, near luxury resorts and quiet coastal stretches, and roughly 30–40 minutes from Samui International Airport via a wide, double-lane road. The setting is highly valued for its privacy, natural surroundings and spectacular sunsets over the southern islands — all within a private gated community with 24/7 security, well-maintained infrastructure, and rare easy hillside access.
